title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Oden, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aaah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: YOU BASTARD...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Remember you from earlier...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WAHA HAHA!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You should be more careful when you talk in public!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A Yakuza thug from the capital KIN'ENON

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: A Yakuza thug from the Capital

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Of course I would over- hear you! This boar is worth one piece of white gold, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: My luck has finally turned around!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I have hit the jackpot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Once I hand this over to boss Kurokoma, I will be a...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ACHOO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hand over your clothes!! And your money, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Um... regarding Lord Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He really does lack the aptitude for sailing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Today was his 38th attempt...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: To illegally leave the country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The fact that he is still alive is surprising...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He really has lived quite the eventful life...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even as a baby, when he was less than a year old, he managed to fling his wet nurse across the room.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By age two, he was able to catch two rabbits with his bare hands.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The shown of nano K02UKI SUKITYAKI (oden's father)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By age four, he was able to throw a large boulder at a bear, crushing it to death!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By age six, he was roaming the red-light district, wasting Royal funds on frivolities.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: By age eight, he was getting drunk and starting fights with gamblers.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: By age nine, even the Yakuza...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Black- listed him and banned him from entering their casino!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He retaliated by setting their casino on fire...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: and practically started a war with them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It all eliminated when he was captured at age 10, after he nearly killed someone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was sentenced to hard labour in the stone quarry...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where he showed off more of his unique talents!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He climbed the ranks at the quarry until he was running the place!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He truly is a member of the Kozuki family!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But after that, his attitude changed significantly...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: When he was 14 years old, the capital was experiencing a prolonged drought!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Wells had dried up, and countless people were suffering,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So he diverted a river straight into the capital.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But that only lead to the capital getting flooded, so his capture was ordered.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, Lord Oden just followed that water route and attempted to escape out to sea. But in the end, that voyage was short lived!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then, at age 15, while he was in hiding, he got a job at a temple deep in the mountains.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Every night, he would kidnap women from the capital...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Waha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...and eventually formed a harem.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Kyaha haha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: the work of the devil...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even though the girls technically chose to stay of their own free will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Their loved ones were enraged!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Their parents, spouses and even powerful samural attempted to rescue them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But Lord Oden stood his ground and eagerly took them on!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that event came to be known as the HAREM REVOLT!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even the Hyogorougoro family got dragged into the freey after failing to prevent the fighting!!

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Lord Oden's victims number in the...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That is quite enough....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Of course. Lord open is 18 now...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yet he still causes trouble on a daily basis.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: ...do not say another word.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Just deliver this to open for me...

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 58 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
